top_signals.title: Neil Woodford criticises BP board for ousting ‘shouty’ chairman
top_signals.summary: Once-renowned investment manager Neil Woodford has criticised the board BP for ousting ‘shouty’ chairman after less than a year. Woodford called out the oil giant’s board for removing Albert Manifold after just eight months in the job, noting that is the third chairman the company has been through in three years, claiming this made BP [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Student loan borrowers will have two new repayment options come July 1. Here's how to pick one
top_signals.summary: Starting July 1, millions of federal student loan holders will have two new ways to repay their debt. Here's what to know about the additional options.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.summary: European Commission Read-out Brussels, 29 May 2026 Today's orientation debate gave the College of Commissioners an opportunity to take stock of EU-China relations — covering both the opportunities they present and the challenges they pose.

top_signals.title: Man sent to prison for selling data of 7 millions elderly Americans
top_signals.summary: A North Carolina man was sentenced to more than 10 years in prison for selling the personal information of over 7 million elderly Americans to Jamaican scammers. [...]
